findings.detail: The site preview appears to use placeholder/parked content instead of a real business site, so I can’t tell if my own content is being preserved.
findings.proposed_solution: Show a clear real-site preview loaded with my actual business content, not placeholder content.

findings.detail: The template chips and palette options are visible, but they don’t explain what changes they make before I click them.
findings.proposed_solution: Add short labels or helper text for templates and palettes so I know what each choice will do.

findings.detail: The chat is present, but it isn’t clear what I should ask it for or how it helps me finish the site.
findings.proposed_solution: Give chat a few suggested prompts like 'write my homepage intro' or 'change my colors' to make it easier to use.

findings.detail: The save/publish actions are there, but I don’t see strong reassurance about what was saved or what happens next.
findings.proposed_solution: After save, show a simple confirmation like 'Your changes were saved' and what was included.

findings.detail: Device toggle exists, but it’s not obvious how to compare versions or whether the changes are truly responsive.
findings.proposed_solution: Make the device toggle more obvious with side-by-side or labeled desktop/mobile previews so I can compare quickly.

warnings.detail: The site preview appears to use placeholder/parked content instead of a real business site, so I can’t tell if my own content is being preserved.
The template chips and palette options are visible, but they don’t explain what changes they make before I click them.
The chat is present, but it isn’t clear what I should ask it for or how it helps me finish the site.
The save/publish actions are there, but I don’t see strong reassurance about what was saved or what happens next.
Device toggle exists, but it’s not obvious how to compare versions or whether the changes are truly responsive.
